# Transcrição: 02-How to Add Client Folder to Google Drive

- **Fonte:** 02-How to Add Client Folder to Google Drive
- **Duração:** 01:02
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:02]

Alright, so under Google Drive, under the client folder for the agency, you're going to create a new folder for the client. You're going to give it the name of the client, and then inside of that folder, we're going to make sure we have the briefing document. So you essentially, before you send that to the client, you duplicate a copy inside this folder and then you share that link to the client so they can fill it out. And we're also going to have the personas framework, and then we're going to also add in our funnel map once we have that done. So this is how to set up the client drive to make sure that everything is organized and in under one spot. You can choose to share this drive, so with the client by clicking share here, and giving them editing purpose, editing access, and advising them to essentially add in any assets, such as creatives or anything like that to this drive as well.
